problem_statement: Traditional pull request reviews are manual, time-intensive, and inconsistent; the paper addresses how generative AI / LLM-based agents can automate PR review while balancing accuracy against required human oversight.
magnitude_evidence: Over 50 million lines of code and 1 million reviews were collected across 9 programming languages (from GitHub repositories with 1000+ stars)
insufficiency_evidence: traditional code review tools, which typically exhibit lower precision and recall rates; existing platforms (Gerrit, Code Flow, Phabricator) generally lack automation for code review tasks
